description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a dark hip roof and a combination of white and wood-textured exterior walls. The front features a small porch with steps leading up to the main entryway, flanked by a low fence and a driveway with two parked cars. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, providing ample natural light. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes a modest yard with a paved driveway and minimal landscaping. The rear of the house has a simple back door and a small patio area. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on geometric lines and functional outdoor space.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark hip roof, white and wood-textured walls, large windows, and a fenced yard with a driveway and porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, porch steps, driveway with two cars, and the fenced yard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the wood-textured wall, side patio, and the expanse of the yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back door, small patio, and the large open yard area.
description_view_3: Right side view with a clear look at the driveway, parked cars, and the side fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with steps, small porch, overhang, and a simple modern door
